description: Five Parsecs From Home Deployment Conditions - Core Rules p.94

conditions.name: No Condition
conditions.description: Normal deployment with no special conditions.

conditions.name: Small Encounter
conditions.description: A random crew member must sit out this fight. Reduce enemy numbers by -1 (-2 if they initially outnumber you).

conditions.name: Poor Visibility
conditions.description: Maximum visibility is 1D6+8". Reroll at the start of each round.

conditions.name: Brief Engagement
conditions.description: At the end of each round, roll 2D6. If the roll is equal or below the round number, the game ends inconclusively.

conditions.name: Toxic Environment
conditions.description: Whenever a combatant is Stunned, roll 1D6+Savvy skill (0 for enemies). Failure to roll a 4+ becomes a casualty.

conditions.name: Surprise Encounter
conditions.description: The enemy can't act in the first round.

conditions.name: Delayed
conditions.description: 2 random crew members won't start on the table. At the end of each round, roll 1D6: If the roll is equal or below the round number, they may be placed at any point of your own battlefield edge.

conditions.name: Slippery Ground
conditions.description: All movement at ground level is -1 Speed.

conditions.name: Caught Off Guard
conditions.description: Your squad all act in the Slow Actions phase in Round 1.

conditions.name: Gloomy
conditions.description: Maximum visibility is 9". Characters that fire can be fired upon at any range, however.
